# Transcrição: 10. Day 30 Contact – Event Offer

## [00:00 - 00:51]

The 30-day contact. This is going to be another event offer. Look, event offers just allow your imagination here. It could be coffee, it could be lunch, it could be something really special, it could be a ballgame, some event, some happening over the next 30, 60 days. Something that shows that you're nurturing this opportunity, that this client's important, that you want to treat them like a VIP. It's called the 30-day event offer. Be creative. When you send out the event offer, you can do it by phone, you can do it by email, you could do it by mail, but hey, if you're going to do it by mail, follow it up by phone. That's the rules. If you're going to do it by email, make sure you got it. You could say, hey, I just sent you an event offer. Want to be sure my email didn't go to your trash. Okay, that's real follow-up. Pay attention to it. Next time I see you is at 40 days. We're going to get this deal yet.
